DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT ZEN COMPOUND, LLC DBA TEMPLE NIGHTCLUB'S MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 14, 2012, PLAINTIFF DUNG TUYEN SHALL PROVIDE, WITHOUT OBJECTION: (1) A STATEMENT OF DAMAGES PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 425.11; (2) ALL DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION, SET ONE, AND A VERIFICATION THEREFOR; (3) SUBSTANTIVE SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, AND A VERIFICATION THEREFOR; AND (4) SUBSTANTIVE SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, AND A VERIFICATION THEREFOR. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED FOR LACK OF PROOF. ORDER SIGNED. PRO TEM JUDGE: REBECCA WOODSON, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-14-2013 Vacated

Ntc Of Motion To Comple And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Holly D. Brauchli, Phillips Spallas & Angstadt, 415.278.9400, appearing for the Defendant Zen Compound;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Ruling: the tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant ZEN COMPOUND, LLC dba TEMPLE NIGHTCLUB's Motion to Compel is GRANTED. On or before December 14, 2012, Plaintiff DUNG TUYEN shall provide, without objection: (1) a Statement of Damages pursuant to C.C.P. section 425.11; (2) all documents responsive to Defendant's Request for Production, Set One, and a verification therefor; (3) substantive supplemental responses to Defendant's Form Interrogatories, Set One, and a verification therefor; and (4) substantive supplemental responses to Defendant's Special Interrogatories, Set One, and a verification therefor. Defendant's Request for Sanctions is DENIED for lack of proof. Order signed. Pro Tem Judge: Rebecca Woodson, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not reported. =302/JPT
